brand.tagline: Find pickup soccer, organize games, and connect with players across Metro Atlanta
brand.valueProposition: The home of pickup soccer in Metro Atlanta. Whether you're after a quick run, looking to join a regular game, or want to organize your own matches—we've got you covered. From 5v5 to 11v11, all abilities welcome.

titleTemplates.hub: Find Soccer Games, Pickup & Leagues in Metro Atlanta | {site_name}
titleTemplates.city: Pickup Soccer in {city} | Find Games & Leagues | {site_name}

meta.authoritativeSummary: Atlanta Soccer Hub is the place to find and organize pickup soccer games across Metro Atlanta.
meta.inShortHub: Atlanta Soccer Hub helps players find and organize pickup soccer games across Metro Atlanta. Join to get local game invites and connect with players near you.
meta.inShortCity: Find and organize pickup soccer in {city}. Get local game invites and connect with players in your area.
meta.defaultTitle: Find Soccer Games, Pickup & Leagues in Metro Atlanta | Atlanta Soccer Hub
meta.defaultDescription: Find and organize pickup soccer games across Metro Atlanta. Join Atlanta Soccer Hub to get notified when new games go live near you.
keyTakeaways: Find and organize pickup soccer games across Metro Atlanta.
Join to get local game invites and connect with players near you.
All levels welcome from 5v5 to 11v11. Free to join.

form.organizerCheckboxLabel: I run local games in {city_name} and want to list them on the site for free.
form.organizerCheckboxHelp: If you already organize runs, you can advertise them here for free and reach more players.

players.microcopy: No spam. Just local soccer updates. Unsubscribe anytime.
